all_cases.description: Parses a valid simplified package artifact into the public package record.
Rejects malformed package artifacts without creating package records.
Adds packages to a local repo idempotently when identity and checksum match.
Rejects same identity with different checksum atomically.
Creates an immutable snapshot from explicit repo membership.
Applies merge conflict semantics over package identity, version, and checksum.
Emits semantic published index and release metadata for explicit snapshot membership.
Computes cleanup reachability over an explicit repo/snapshot/publish graph.
Creates and recovers a pending publish transaction through the public test hook.
all_cases.expected_output:
True old True
completed True
new
all_cases.actual:
True old True
completed True
new
all_cases.expected:
True old True
completed True
new

all_cases.description: Returns semantic graph edge sets without relying on edge order.
Reports changed package versions in snapshot_diff with old and new public records.
Failed publish_switch exposes the previous committed publish view, blocks cleanup/mutations, and waits for recover.
Repo mutations after snapshot creation do not mutate old snapshots, and snapshot show, diff, graph, and published indexes agree.
Publish switch preserves prefix options while published index, publish show, graph, and cleanup dry-run agree with the new snapshot.
all_cases.expected_output:
stable main amd64 new
[('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64'), ('alpha', '2.0', 'amd64')]
True
True
all_cases.actual:
stable main amd64 new
[('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64'), ('alpha', '2.0', 'amd64')]
True
True
all_cases.expected:
stable main amd64 new
[('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64'), ('alpha', '2.0', 'amd64')]
True
True

all_cases.description: Cleanup removes only artifacts unreachable from repos, snapshots, published prefixes, and pending transactions.
Failed publish switch with public fail_at hook does not expose mixed snapshot state across publish show, index, graph, cleanup, and recover.
all_cases.expected_output:
old [('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64')] True
True completed True
new True
all_cases.actual:
old [('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64')] True
True completed True
new True
all_cases.expected:
old [('alpha', '1.0', 'amd64')] True
True completed True
new True

all_cases.description: Snapshot merge/filter parentage and package selection agree across snapshot show, published index, graph, search/show, and cleanup reachability.
